name: Seven Hills Realty Trust
business: Seven Hills Realty Trust originates and invests in floating rate first mortgage loans secured by middle market transitional commercial real estate properties. The loans range from $15.0 million to $75.0 million and are used to finance redevelopment or repositioning of properties. The company generates returns from interest income and fees on these loans.
sellsTo: borrowers seeking bridge financing for transitional commercial real estate properties
